home.title: A place to publish poems that breathe.
home.subtitle: Each text is displayed like a unique piece: clean, readable, and ready to share.
home.manifestText: This website is designed to welcome new poems without friction. You can grow the collection over time and preserve an elegant archive of your voice.

items.title: Ink Night
lines: The moon folds its sheets above the roofs of town,
I let one word burn slowly where my seasons drown,
And silence writes beyond the edge of all my borders.

items.title: Behind the Glass
lines: The street glues neon light against my quiet face,
A bus carries the dawn with metal-scented grace,
I count the passersby the way we count the stars.

items.title: Letter to Tomorrow
lines: I hide a little sky inside my pocketed fears,
I learn to light a fire from old and patient tears,
Tomorrow knows my name among the waking windows.
